title: Egghead Falls Under Siege
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Luffy, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Bonney as CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.
scene: CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if the world does not accept how she came to be...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: the girl is unmistakably human!! It was a success!!;)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I bear witness to this achievement...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and I maintain that it is a huge step toward world peace!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: -Dr. Teganuk, Chief of MADS, The Laboratory of Peace.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: *SOB* it hurts! I think I broke some- thing!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Dear Me!! Are You All Right? Medics, Look Alive!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I suppose these shiny doo-dads are a manifestation of the years I just lost.

summary: This part advances the Egghead Under Siege through 29 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
